title: Genetic Animals - Get In The Bucket Compat
description: Allows for easier identification of the genetic animals you have stored in buckets!
body:
This resourcepack will only work with Genetic Animals and Get In The Bucket. You will also need a mod that allows CIT, we recommend the CIT Reforged mod!

When installed, this resourcepack visually shows which genetic animal is in the bucket, as well as their gender. Allows for easier identification of the animals you have stored!
